instruction:
Compute the integral:
$$
-\int \frac{ \sin\left(\frac{ x }{ 3 }\right)^4 }{ \cos\left(\frac{ x }{ 3 }\right)^2 } \, dx
$$

Options:
A. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)+C
B. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{5\cdot x}{3}\right)+C
C. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{3\cdot x}{3}\right)+C
D. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{2\cdot x}{3}\right)+C
E. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{6\cdot x}{3}\right)+C
F. -\frac{3\cdot\sin\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)^3}{\cos\left(\frac{x}{3}\right)}+\frac{3}{2}\cdot x-\frac{9}{4}\cdot\sin\left(\frac{4\cdot x}{3}\right)+C
